projects.title: Last Sentinel
projects.description: Senior Gameplay Engineer on this narrative open-world action game set in a futuristic Tokyo. Architected a Mission system to manage data layers and control mission flow — enabling designers to fast-forward, rewind, and debug objectives. Created an IGC (In-Game Cinematic) framework for scripting multi-character animated scenes with props, moving platforms, and QTEs in a data-driven way. Integrated UE5's Level Sequencer into the scripting framework. Extended save/load architecture to handle mission checkpoints, open-world auto-saves, and mid-mission snapshots. Developed a UI framework using an MVVM pattern integrated with UE5's ViewModel architecture.

projects.title: Hearthstone
projects.description: Software Engineer on the Hearthstone team across eight major expansions, focused on solo adventure experiences and the systems that power the in-game Journal — quests, achievements, missions, and reward progression.

subprojects.title: Framework & Scripting
subprojects.description: Implemented a Lua scripting framework on the game server enabling data-driven mission and quest scripting. Refactored the hero picker to be fully data-driven. Contributed to UI framework improvements in Unity/C#.

subprojects.title: Solo Adventures
subprojects.description: Implemented the design for The Dalaran Heist (Rise of Shadows) and Tombs of Terror (Saviors of Uldum) — building mission flow, encounter management, and the systems powering branching adventure progression.

subprojects.title: Journal, Quests & Achievements
subprojects.description: Built and extended systems within the Hearthstone Journal — daily and weekly quest tracking, achievement pipelines, reward progression, and the scripted mission system used to define player objectives for each expansion cycle.

projects.title: Ghostbusters
projects.description: Software Engineer at FireForge on the Ghostbusters game tied to the 2016 film. Worked on the AI and gameplay ability system, supporting designers by exposing features to scripting. Modified the engine to handle dialog audio based on culture/locale settings and improved AI movement with a box volume constraint system.

projects.title: StarBlood Arena
projects.description: Gameplay Programmer on this 360-degree PSVR arena shooter. Improved custom AI navigation generation and added difficulty levels. Implemented single-player and cooperative game modes, including a wave defense mode optimized with a pool manager. Set up the framework for sending match configurations to the matchmaking service and refactored the team system to support matchmaking data.

projects.title: Vessels of Rath
projects.description: Action RPG developed internally at WhiteMoon Dreams to showcase the studio's Orbital platform, a cloud backend for hosting and serving live game content.

projects.title: RTS Prototype
projects.description: Online multiplayer RTS prototype built with a team of 3 engineers. Worked on AI, formations, ability/attribute system, targeting system, and various other systems. Used in multiple sales pitches.

projects.title: Shadowrun Crossfire Digital Prototype
projects.description: Proof of concept prototype demonstrating an online version of the Shadowrun Crossfire tabletop game. Developed in under a week, helping win an RFP. Worked on the Socket.IO implementation and UI integration.

projects.title: Crazy 88s
projects.description: Personal project made with a group of friends. A card game framework in Unity to implement favorite card games and play them digitally online via phone or PC.

projects.title: Furball Frenzy
projects.description: Personal project made to help a friend with her senior art thesis. A simple cat matching game in the vein of Bejeweled built in two weeks. Worked on gameplay, sprite animation, and the matching algorithm.
